title: Arsène Lupin Returns
writer: James Kevin McGuinness, Howard Emmett Rogers, George Harmon Coxe
actors: Melvyn Douglas, Virginia Bruce, Warren William
plot: A woman and a man vying for a woman's affection: the usual love trio? Not quite so since the belle in question is Lorraine de Grissac, a very wealthy and alluring society woman, while one of the two rivals is none other than Arsèn...
